posts.title: I Engineered a VP's Voice. The AI Infrastructure Industry Could Learn a Thing or Two.
posts.excerpt: I spent months building a system that writes like one specific leader. The hard part wasn't the writing, it was learning how she decides.

posts.title: What Do AI Employees Know About Using LLMs That I Don't?
posts.excerpt: Their edge isn't IQ. It's a workflow you can steal. Mike Krieger built Instagram. Now he builds AI products at Anthropic, the company behind Claude.
